action.description: The committee on EDN recommend that the measure be PASSED, WITH AMENDMENTS. The votes were as follows: 7 Ayes: Representative(s) Woodson, La Chica, Evslin, Kapela, Olds, Muraoka, Souza; Ayes with reservations: none;  Noes: none; and 3 Excused: Representative(s) Amato, Garrett, Kila.
